message:
refactor: rename glibc_rust to FrankenLibC across all crates

Rebrands the project from glibc_rust to FrankenLibC to better reflect
its nature as a hybrid Rust/C libc implementation rather than a direct
glibc port. The "Franken" prefix aligns with the broader Franken* family
of projects (FrankenSQLite, FrankenTUI, FrankenTerm).

Crate renames:
- glibc_rust → frankenlibc
- glibc-rs-membrane → frankenlibc-membrane
- glibc-rs-core → frankenlibc-core
- glibc-rs-abi → frankenlibc-abi
- glibc-rs-harness → frankenlibc-harness
- glibc-rs-bench → frankenlibc-bench
- glibc-rs-fuzz → frankenlibc-fuzz
- glibc_rust_conformance → frankenlibc_conformance

Environment variable renames:
- GLIBC_RUST_MODE → FRANKENLIBC_MODE
- GLIBC_RS_STARTUP_PHASE0 → FRANKENLIBC_STARTUP_PHASE0

Symbol renames:
- __glibc_rs_startup_phase0 → __frankenlibc_startup_phase0

Workspace changes:
- Updated all workspace.members paths
- Updated all workspace.dependencies paths
- Updated all internal crate dependencies

This is a breaking change for:
- Crate consumers (new crate names)
- Runtime configuration (new env var names)
- ABI linkage (new symbol names)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,14 +1,14 @@
 [workspace]
 resolver = "2"
 members = [
-  "crates/glibc-rs-membrane",
-  "crates/glibc-rs-core",
-  "crates/glibc-rs-abi",
-  "crates/glibc-rs-harness",
-  "crates/glibc-rs-bench",
+  "crates/frankenlibc-membrane",
+  "crates/frankenlibc-core",
+  "crates/frankenlibc-abi",
+  "crates/frankenlibc-harness",
+  "crates/frankenlibc-bench",
   # Legacy crates (kept for migration compatibility)
-  "crates/glibc_rust",
-  "crates/glibc_rust_conformance",
+  "crates/frankenlibc",
+  "crates/frankenlibc_conformance",
 ]
 
 [workspace.package]
@@ -31,9 +31,9 @@ criterion = "0.5"
 libc = "0.2"
 
 # Internal crates
-glibc-rs-membrane = { path = "crates/glibc-rs-membrane" }
-glibc-rs-core = { path = "crates/glibc-rs-core" }
-glibc-rs-abi = { path = "crates/glibc-rs-abi" }
+frankenlibc-membrane = { path = "crates/frankenlibc-membrane" }
+frankenlibc-core = { path = "crates/frankenlibc-core" }
+frankenlibc-abi = { path = "crates/frankenlibc-abi" }
 
 # Companion crates (build tooling only)
 asupersync-conformance = { path = "/dp/asupersync/conformance" }

@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
 [package]
-name = "glibc-rs-abi"
+name = "frankenlibc-abi"
 version.workspace = true
 edition.workspace = true
 license.workspace = true
-description = "ABI-compatible extern C boundary for glibc_rust (produces libc.so)"
+description = "ABI-compatible extern C boundary for FrankenLibC (produces libc.so)"
 build = "build.rs"
 
 [lib]
@@ -13,8 +13,8 @@ crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
 unsafe_code = "allow"
 
 [dependencies]
-glibc-rs-membrane = { workspace = true }
-glibc-rs-core = { workspace = true }
+frankenlibc-membrane = { workspace = true }
+frankenlibc-core = { workspace = true }
 libc = { workspace = true }
 
 [dev-dependencies]

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 [package]
-name = "glibc-rs-core"
+name = "frankenlibc-core"
 version.workspace = true
 edition.workspace = true
 license.workspace = true
@@ -9,4 +9,4 @@ description = "Safe Rust implementations of libc functions"
 unsafe_code = "deny"
 
 [dependencies]
-glibc-rs-membrane = { workspace = true }
+frankenlibc-membrane = { workspace = true }

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 [package]
-name = "glibc-rs-fuzz"
+name = "frankenlibc-fuzz"
 version = "0.0.0"
 edition = "2024"
 publish = false
@@ -9,8 +9,8 @@ cargo-fuzz = true
 
 [dependencies]
 libfuzzer-sys = "0.4"
-glibc-rs-membrane = { path = "../glibc-rs-membrane" }
-glibc-rs-core = { path = "../glibc-rs-core" }
+frankenlibc-membrane = { path = "../frankenlibc-membrane" }
+frankenlibc-core = { path = "../frankenlibc-core" }
 
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_string"

@@ -1,9 +1,9 @@
 [package]
-name = "glibc-rs-membrane"
+name = "frankenlibc-membrane"
 version.workspace = true
 edition.workspace = true
 license.workspace = true
-description = "Transparent Safety Membrane for glibc_rust"
+description = "Transparent Safety Membrane for FrankenLibC"
 
 [features]
 default = ["runtime-math-production"]

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 [package]
-name = "glibc_rust"
+name = "frankenlibc"
 version.workspace = true
 edition.workspace = true
 license.workspace = true
